The one thing I really prefer in Kazakhstan over Bahrain is climate. It is not that hot here, though the summer is still pretty hot, other seasons are really nice. Also humidity plays a big role, and in Kazakhstan becasuse there are no seas close it feels much better compared to bahrain. About new school I still am not sure how to feel. I will be continueing IGCSE system, and that is a big relief. However the exam board will still slightly change and in subjects like English literature and language, this will be higly noticeable. thise were the subjects I found most challenging. My hobbies will stay the same there is no difference from bahrain, only that i wanna try acoustic guitar instead of classical. also that now i can workout outside
